home.title: Guardian Hub
home.intro: Guardian Hub is your central hub for Destiny 2, search items and god rolls, manage your gear and loadouts, track the weekly reset and events, study meta builds, and check your own and your fireteam's stats.
home.tagline: Eyes up, Guardian: everything in one place, in your language.

items.title: Items
items.desc: Search all weapons, armor and mods from the Destiny 2 database.

gear.title: Gear
gear.desc: View your own characters and equipment (login required).

builds.title: Meta Builds
builds.desc: Strongest PvE and PvP builds for the current seasonal meta.

players.title: Players
players.desc: Search players and view their K/D, wins, Trials, Iron Banner and Flawless count.

events.title: Events Tracker
events.desc: Weekly reset, milestones, vendors and active activities.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.desc: Destiny 2 updates, patches and rotations, newest on top.

sandbox.title: Buffs & Nerfs
sandbox.desc: Sandbox changes per Bungie, buffs, nerfs and adjustments.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.desc: Your own guardians, stats and gear, visible when logged in.

players.title: Players
players.intro: Search by Bungie name (e.g. Fhaxyy#3853) and view PvP stats: K/D, wins, Trials, Iron Banner and how often someone went Flawless.
players.loginPrompt: 🤝 Log in with Bungie to see whether you've been matched with a player.
players.searchPlaceholder: Bungie name, e.g. Fhaxyy or Fhaxyy#3853
players.hint: Type (part of) a Bungie name to find players.
players.noResultsTip: Tip: search by Bungie name, not the PSN gamertag, they can differ. Know the code? Try Name#1234 for an exact match.
players.loadFailed: Couldn't load stats. The profile may be set to private in the Bungie privacy settings.
players.shared: 🤝 You've recently been in the same PvP match as this player {count}×
players.sharedNone: No recent shared PvP matches found (based on your last ~50 games).
players.flawlessNote: ℹ️ Lifetime Flawless isn't reliably available in the Bungie API (the "tickets" metric doesn't count everything).
players.flawlessLink: View the verified Flawless count on Trials Report ↗
players.noPvp: No public PvP stats found (no PvP played or profile is private).
players.buildNote: ℹ️ This is the player's current loadout. The Bungie API doesn't store which build someone used in a specific match, but this is usually what they're (still) running.
players.buildLoadFailed: Couldn't load the build (profile may be private).

items.title: Items
items.intro: Search all weapons, armor, mods and more from the Destiny 2 database.
items.hint: Type an item name above to search.
items.searchFailed: Search failed: {error}. Have you set your BUNGIE_API_KEY?
items.noSource: No specific source info available in the manifest. This item likely comes from general world drops or vendor engrams.
items.exoticNoRoll: Exotic with fixed perks, there's no random "god roll". See the Exotic trait above.
items.noWishlist: No wishlist roll known for this weapon.
items.sourceNote: Bungie's database usually lists one main source. See all current ways to get this item (updated each Destiny patch) on light.gg.

gear.title: Gear
gear.noChars: No Destiny 2 characters found on this account.
gear.intro: {name}'s equipment. Drag an item onto a slot to equip it, or to another guardian / the vault to move it. Or click it for options.
gear.loginPrompt: Log in with your Bungie account to manage your characters and equipment.
gear.postmaster: Postmaster ({n}), click for god roll & pull
gear.equippedNote: Equipped, moving will automatically equip another item from the inventory in this slot first.
gear.cannotMoveEquipped: You can't move equipped items, equip something else first.
gear.noReplacement: "{name}" is equipped on {who} and that guardian has no other item for that slot in its inventory. Equip something else there first.
gear.slotNotFit: This item doesn't fit in this slot.
gear.searchPlaceholder: 🔎 Search all your gear (click a result to equip)…

builds.title: Meta Builds
builds.intro: Builds per mode for {season} · last updated {date}.
builds.note: Recent community builds (Armor 3.0). Pick a mode to see the builds. Hover over an exotic for info.
builds.sourceDetail: Source: {source}, verify/fine-tune on light.gg or Mobalytics.

events.title: Events Tracker
events.intro: Resets, weekend events and active milestones, with live countdowns.
events.weeklyMissing: The Nightfall weapon, Legend Lost Sector and featured dungeon/raid aren't in the Bungie API and are maintained separately.
events.vendorsLoginRest: to see what Xûr, Banshee-44 and Ada-1 are selling now.
events.noVendors: No vendor inventory available (Xûr only appears on weekends).
events.rewardPool: Loot from the activity pool + weekly reward

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.intro: Destiny 2 updates, patches and rotations, newest on top.

sandbox.title: Buffs & Nerfs
sandbox.intro: Sandbox changes per Bungie's patch notes.
sandbox.note: Editorial overview (the API doesn't provide patch notes).

profile.title: My Profile
profile.intro: Your guardians, stats and gear at a glance.
profile.loginPrompt: Log in with Bungie to see your own profile.
